caption: Two people appear in a split-screen video call. On the left is Margaret Harrington, a woman with reddish-blonde hair wearing a blue patterned shirt and red earrings. On the right is Greg Delanty, a man with glasses and a grey beard wearing a purple shirt, positioned in a room with a blue wall and a framed picture. On-screen text at the bottom reads "FOCUS with Margaret Harrington" on the left and "No More Time Climate Crisis Poems by Greg Delanty" on the right, accompanied by a "TOWN MEETING TV" logo. As the sequence progresses, Margaret maintains a similar attentive expression while speaking. Greg is initially seen speaking, then transitions to a gesture where he raises both hands to touch the top of his head. The background and graphic overlays remain constant throughout the scene.
